Title: Worst product
Review Content: After using 3 months it's not a good product which will last long...suddenly that was broken 2 days back which I was using. This kind of product should not be entertained without proper quality check. Requesting amazon please look into this matter going forward.

Title: Didn’t have long life
Review Content: Worked well but the tip broke , looks like the clamp on side broke and was not able to fix it .Used it judiciously, but anyways..

Title: Value for money
Review Content: amazed by its power and runtime. very smooth and effective.

Title: Extremely Poor Build Quality – Broke Within 2 Months
Review Content: I purchased this Bombay Shaving Company trimmer from Amazon in September 2025, and within less than two months of normal use, the blade attachment holder broke completely. Because of this, the blade no longer fits or locks properly, making the trimmer unusable.I always handled it carefully and only removed the blade for cleaning as per the instructions, but the plastic part that holds the blade cracked instantly. This clearly shows very low-quality material and weak build for a product priced around ₹1600–₹1700.I request Amazon and Bombay Shaving Company to please replace or repair this defective product. I have attached photos showing the damage for reference.Such quality issues are unexpected from a reputed brand, kindly take this matter seriously and resolve it at the earliest.

Title: Broken handle
Review Content: The product was good but the head of the blade was broken while in use...So it was a very bad experience.plzz make this product body little bit hard nd strong.

Title: Beard Trimmer
Review Content: Very nice and slim product. Easy to use.
